Caption: Schematic of the Vevo 770 (FUJIFILM VisualSonics, Toronto, ON, Canada) setup. TPX = polymethylpentene.
Schematic of the dedicated high-frequency ultrasound facility developed at the National Physical Laboratory (NPL, Teddington, UK).
Speed of sound as a function of frequency. NPL = National Physical Laboratory, HF = high frequency, LF = low frequency.

Attenuation as a function of frequency for the National Physical Laboratory (NPL) and Vevo 770 measurements. A polynomial curve is fitted to the results of each system (αnpl and αvevo). HF = high frequency, LF = low frequency.
